prompt: Premium dark magazine-style infographic poster. Sparkly dark starfield background. Top text: 'HOW MUCH BREAD IS IN YOUR DRINK?' in gold serif font. Center: large text 'CASTLE LAGER' in bold white with '200 CALORIES' in green below. Below that: photorealistic frosty pint of golden lager on the LEFT, green equals sign in the middle, and 2.5 slices of white bread on the RIGHT. Below: 'EQUIVALENT TO 2.5 SLICES OF BREAD' in gold serif. Tagline: 'Every pint. Every braai. Every Friday.' in italic white. Bottom: 'Track your calories on WhatsApp.' with WhatsApp green. Footer: FITSORTED.CO.ZA in small caps. Dark luxury advertising aesthetic, portrait format.
